Tagged “archive”

  1. Gemini will determine the success of Android XR December 2024

  3. Persistent Storage for Hubs on DigitalOcean October 2024

  4. WebXR for Web Developers August 2024
    Doing VR and AR on the WWW requires a raft of APIs, libraries, languages, services, file formats, design metrics and approaches that web developers don't normally use.
  5. While You Were Sleeping (1995) August 2024
    The plot runs on coincidences, but it's fun.
  6. The Italian Job (1969) July 2024
    Over-the-top automotive mayhem, but nothing else
  7. Join the Cool Kids — If You're Allowed! — The Web Share APIs March 2024
    The Web Share API and Web Share Target API allow your web app to send and receive content from native apps, like the big social networking apps.
